fault_hypothesis: Line 75 computes the new expiration but never writes it back to the cache dict. The cache entry is never updated with the new expires_at, so the warm-cache TTL extension is silently discarded.

spec.expr: cache.get(key) is not None and cache[key][1] == now + ttl__1

constraints.intent: After computing the new expiration, the cache must already be updated with the new expires_at value.
After assigning the new expiration, the cache entry should reflect the updated expiration timestamp.
After confirming the entry is not expired, the cache must have been updated so the stored expiration is at least now + ttl.

spec.expr: __cbfl_result is None or (key in cache and cache[key][1] >= now + ttl)

constraints.intent: When a valid value is returned, the cache entry must have been refreshed with the new expiration.
